Cleo is now a profitable, fast-growing business. Revenue nearly doubled to $136 million with a $186 million exit run-rate. We reached sustained profitability in 2024, with an 8.4% EBITDA margin and net income profitability from August onwards.

Barney Hussey-Yeo,founder & CEO
